title: AI Engineer, AI Services
company_focus:
Builds platforms for digital business and digital
transformation
description:
AHEAD builds platforms for digital business. By weaving
together advances in cloud infrastructure, automation and
analytics, and software delivery, we help enterprises
deliver on the promise of digital transformation.

At AHEAD, we prioritize creating a culture of belonging,
where all perspectives and voices are represented, valued,
respected, and heard. We create spaces to empower everyone
to speak up, make change, and drive the culture at AHEAD.

We are an equal opportunity employer, and do not
discriminate based on an individual's race, national origin,
color, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual
orientation, religion, age, disability, marital status, or
any other protected characteristic under applicable law,
whether actual or perceived.

We embrace all candidates that will contribute to the
diversification and enrichment of ideas and perspectives at
AHEAD.

Role Overview

The AI Engineer is a hands-on builder who develops and
deploys agentic AI solutions for AHEAD’s clients. You will
work on multi-agent workflows, retrieval pipelines, and
system integrations that automate real business processes
like document handling, SDLC tasks, service desk actions,
reporting, and decision support.

This role focuses on implementing and improving components
within larger agentic systems. You will collaborate closely
with senior engineers, solution managers, and client teams
to translate ideas into working automations. It is an ideal
role for someone eager to deepen their skills in applied AI,
workflow orchestration, and enterprise integration.

Key Responsibilities

- Agentic Solution Development
- Build and customize agents using frameworks such as
  LangChain, LangGraph, Autogen, CrewAI, or LlamaIndex.
- Implement components for document processing, workflow
  automation, data retrieval, and structured output
  generation.
- Develop and maintain vector DB pipelines (Pinecone,
  pgvector, Elasticsearch) and RAG-based retrieval
  workflows.
- Configure LLM/SLM endpoints, tool-calling functions, and
  agent memory/state handling.
- Workflow & Integration Engineering
- Implement real-time and batch workflows using Python, Kafka,
  EventBridge, Airflow, Celery, Snowflake, S3, or n8n.
- Build integrations with enterprise tools (SharePoint,
  Salesforce, ServiceNow, Jira, APIs).
- Support data transformations, validation, and versioning
  needed for downstream agent operations.
- Quality, Testing & Observability
- Write tests for agent behavior, pipelines, and model output
  consistency.
- Contribute to monitoring, logging, metrics, and guardrail
  configurations for agentic systems.
- Participate in debugging sessions and post-incident reviews
  with senior engineers.
- Client Delivery Support
- Participate in client workshops, demos, and working sessions
  as part of the engineering team.
- Translate requirements from senior engineers or solution
  managers into technical tasks and working components.
- Help document solution behavior, configurations, and
  deployment steps for clients.
- Security, Governance & Responsible AI
- Follow established patterns for access control, data
  handling, safe model usage, and auditing.
- Ensure compliance and guardrail configurations are
  consistently applied in implementations.
- Team Collaboration & Growth
- Contribute to internal documentation, code templates, and
  reusable building blocks.
- Learn and apply AHEAD’s reference architectures, best
  practices, and agentic patterns.
- Support onboarding of new engineers and collaborate in agile
  ceremonies.

Qualifications

- Required
- Solid Python programming skills and experience building
  APIs, batch jobs, or automation scripts.
- Exposure to multi-agent or LLM application frameworks
  (LangChain, LangGraph, Autogen, LlamaIndex, CrewAI).
- Familiarity with vector databases and retrieval workflows
  (Pinecone, pgvector, Elasticsearch).
- Experience with data engineering or workflow tools (Kafka,
  EventBridge, Snowflake, Airflow, Celery, AWS services, or
  similar).
- Strong attention to documentation, testing, and
  collaborative engineering practices.
- Ability to learn quickly in fast-moving, client-facing
  environments.
- Preferred
- Experience integrating with enterprise systems or SaaS
  platforms (ServiceNow, Salesforce, SharePoint, databases).
- Familiarity with MLOps, containerization, or observability
  stacks.
- Exposure to cloud services (AWS, Azure, GCP).
- Success Metrics
- High-quality implementation of agentic components,
  integrations, and workflows.
- Reliability and consistency of delivered features, validated
  through tests and monitoring.
- Steady velocity of delivery within agile teams.
- Strong collaboration with senior engineers and positive
  feedback from client teams.
- Demonstrated growth in agentic engineering skills and
  contribution to reusable assets.

Why AHEAD:

Through our daily work and internal groups like Moving Women
AHEAD and RISE AHEAD, we value and benefit from diversity of
people, ideas, experience, and everything in between.

We fuel growth by stacking our office with top-notch
technologies in a multi-million-dollar lab, by encouraging
cross department training and development, sponsoring
certifications and credentials for continued learning.

USA Employment Benefits include:

- Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance

- 401(k)

- Paid company holidays

- Paid time off

- Paid parental and caregiver leave

- Plus more! See benefits https://www.aheadbenefits.com/ for
  additional details.

The compensation range indicated in this posting reflects
the On-Target Earnings (“OTE”) for this role, which includes
a base salary and any applicable target bonus amount. This
OTE range may vary based on the candidate’s relevant
experience, qualifications, and geographic location.

Streamline SDLC tasks and development lifecycle automation
Enhance service desk actions and support ticket processing
Automate reporting and decision support processes
Enable enterprise system integrations with AI agents for business process automation
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on builder role developing and deploying
agentic AI solutions using LLM frameworks, multi-agent
workflows, and RAG systems. The engineer directly works on
implementing agents, configuring LLM endpoints, building
vector database pipelines, and deploying AI solutions to
clients.
